notes.body: The Power of One — One Brand, One Team, One Family. The Operations Manual is now the single source of truth; execute consistently in Hiring, Training, Leadership, Daily Operations. Staffing is a top priority — every GM develops two future GMs a year and keeps a minimum of six Shift Leaders. 100% shopper scores are attainable via the Halo Effect, Suggestive Selling, and grill culture.

K.P.I. Ranking: 60% of our score comes from Secret Shop scores, Customer complaints (CSPs), and Ticket times. Coach unhappy guests early, spot-check register (fry/drink/shake every time), correct grill culture, stay rush-ready. Execute the basics every shift. Reminder (6/18): any outside vendor call still needs a Hub ticket.

Open tasks for KY-2065: Post Period Labor Not Posted (7/05), Inv-Final for Post (7/05), four L-Rev labor reviews (7/01-7/04), and receiving to reconcile (VO-Rec, LT-Rec). Facility: Hub #9709 potato-sink first faucet stripped out again (Craig Holcomb 7/4).
